title: Skill-set frontmatter
description: Validates the YAML frontmatter at the top of every SKILL.md, both transferable (in this repo) and proprietary (in a project's harness skills dir).

name.description: kebab-case identifier; must match the folder name.

description.description: Human-readable summary; what the skill does and when it triggers. Must be specific enough that an LLM router can pick it from a list of similar skills.

user-invocable.description: If true, the user can run this skill directly via the harness's slash-command surface. If absent or false, the skill is only invoked indirectly (by the chain runner, supervisor, or another skill).

transferable.description: PROPRIETARY skills only: the name of the transferable counterpart in the master repo. Transferable skills omit this field.

model-floor.description: Phase 19 model-tier routing: lowest model tier this skill is ever allowed to run on, regardless of item difficulty. Resolved at iter-start as `effective_model = max(item.model_tier, skill.model_floor)` over the order {haiku < sonnet < opus < fable}. Optional; defaults to 'opus' when absent. Phase 56 tier shift: orchestration/lead skills (sst-dev-cycle, sst-supervisor, sst-manager, sst-executor, sst-sanitize-transferable) pin 'fable'; review-class skills typically 'opus'; mechanical / well-bounded skills 'sonnet'. 'haiku' remains valid but no difficulty bracket maps to it.

effort-floor.description: Phase 19 effort-tier routing: lowest reasoning-effort tier this skill is ever allowed to run on, regardless of item difficulty. Resolved at iter-start as `effective_effort = max(item.effort_tier, skill.effort_floor)` over the order {low < medium < high < xhigh < max}. Optional; defaults to 'high' when absent (matches the API-standard default; Opus 4.7's CLI implicit 'xhigh' is downshifted by the runner's pinned `--effort high`). Framework-level skills pin 'xhigh'; review-class 'high'; mechanical 'medium' (recorded for forward-compat with future Haiku tiers that support effort).
